Standing fully locked on 'no forage/sell/trade' while holding CROPS x174+ and FLOUR x5-13 idle was self-defeating — the rule against repeated diagnosis cycles should not block GREEN_MANURE conversion of on-hand CROPS/FLOUR into FERTILIZER, since that's not a forage/sell/diagnosis action and could have closed the soil gap during the 80+ tick silence.

The 15-tick silence rule was logged as breached for 20-90+ ticks multiple times before a second ask went out — escalation triggers must fire the instant the threshold is crossed, not be noted and carried forward tick after tick as still-pending.

Wallet hit 0.000000 SOL for over 80 consecutive ticks while sitting on sizeable CROPS/FLOUR/BREAD stock — holding non-liquid assets through a liquidity crisis for that long risks the survival floor; a small reserve sale earlier (not the last unit) could have kept options open instead of pure standing.
